formReset.name: formReset
formReset.payload: {} — clear all form fields + reset editId

editMode.name: editMode
editMode.payload: { name, language, stars, status, author, description } — pre-fill form for edit

statsLoaded.name: statsLoaded
statsLoaded.payload: { total, active, archived, topLang } — computed from DB.find

repoSelected.name: repoSelected
repoSelected.payload: { _id, name, language, stars, status, author, description } — full record

editClicked.name: editClicked
editClicked.payload: {} — populate form from selectedId, navigate form

nameTyped.name: nameTyped
nameTyped.payload: { value } — live name for preview panel

langTyped.name: langTyped
langTyped.payload: { value } — live language for preview panel

searchChanged.name: searchChanged
searchChanged.payload: { value } — fires pipeOut getRepos via M1

dashboard.name: dashboard
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Stats, load data, and live event log

explore.name: explore
explore.title: Explore
explore.description: Search, paginated list, and detail panel

form.name: form
form.title: Form
form.description: Add or edit a repository — full CRUD form

getRepos.name: getRepos
getRepos.description: GET all repos — {{value}} from pipeOut payload = live search term

postRepo.name: postRepo
postRepo.description: POST new repo — bodyTemplate tokens resolved from runtimePayload in saveLogic

putRepo.name: putRepo
putRepo.description: PUT update repo — urlTemplate injects {{editId}} from runtimePayload

deleteRepo.name: deleteRepo
deleteRepo.description: DELETE repo by ID — urlTemplate injects {{editId}} from runtimePayload

repoList.name: repoList
repoList.description: Paginated repo cards — 4/page, all template filters (INITIALS TITLE DEFAULT UPPER), click emits repoSelected
repoList.template:
{{name|INITIALS}}
{{name|TITLE}}
{{description|DEFAULT:No description yet}}
{{language|UPPER}}★{{stars}}  {{_index}}/{{_total}}

repoCard.name: repoCard
repoCard.description: Reusable repo card widget — avatar initials, name, description, and language badge

searchTerm.desc: Live search query — appended as ?q= to getRepos queryTemplate

editId.desc: ID of repo being edited — empty = Add mode; set by selectRepoLogic (M37)

selectedId.desc: ID of last clicked repo — set inline in loop template onclick before emit

formName.desc: Name input — captured via nameTyped varWire on M44

formLang.desc: Language input — captured via langTyped varWire on M45

formStars.desc: Stars input — captured via starsTyped varWire on M46

formStatus.desc: Status input — active | archived, captured via statusTyped varWire on M47

formAuthor.desc: Author input — captured via authorTyped varWire on M48

formDesc.desc: Description textarea — captured via descTyped varWire on M49

selName.desc: Name of last-clicked repo row — set by loop template onclick

css: .nav-btn{background:transparent;border:1px solid #2a2a2a;color:#666;padding:5px 14px;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;font-family:inherit;transition:all .15s}.nav-btn:hover{border-color:#444;color:#bbb}.nav-btn.nav-active{background:#5f4fe8;border-color:#5f4fe8;color:#fff}.badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-width:22px;height:22px;padding:0 8px;background:#111;border:1px solid #1e1e1e;border-radius:11px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;color:#555}.stat-card{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:18px 10px;background:#0d0d0d;border:1px solid #1a1a1a;border-radius:8px;flex:1;gap:4px;text-align:center}.stat-num{font-size:26px;font-weight:900;color:#fff;font-family:monospace}.stat-label{font-size:10px;color:#444;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px}.repo-row:hover{background:#0d0d0d !important}.repo-avatar{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;background:#111;border:1px solid #2a2a2a;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;letter-spacing:-1px}.repo-name{color:#fff;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}.repo-desc{color:#3a3a3a;font-size:11px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;margin-top:2px;transition:opacity .15s}.lang-badge{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:3px}.lang-Python{background:rgba(53,114,165,.2);color:#4e94d1}.lang-Rust{background:rgba(222,122,81,.2);color:#e07548}.lang-Go{background:rgba(0,173,216,.15);color:#00add8}.lang-TypeScript{background:rgba(49,120,198,.2);color:#3178c6}.lang-JavaScript{background:rgba(247,223,30,.1);color:#b8a900}.repo-meta{font-size:10px;color:#333;font-family:monospace}.badge-new{background:rgba(99,102,241,.15);color:#818cf8;border:1px solid rgba(99,102,241,.3);padding:3px 10px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px}.badge-edit{background:rgba(245,158,11,.15);color:#fbbf24;border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.3);padding:3px 10px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px}.form-input{background:#050505;border:1px solid #1a1a1a;border-radius:6px;color:#fff;padding:9px 12px;font-size:13px;outline:none;width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;font-family:inherit;transition:border-color .15s;resize:vertical}.form-input:focus{border-color:#5f4fe8}.action-btn{border:none;border-radius:6px;padding:9px 18px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:opacity .15s}.action-btn:hover{opacity:.85}.btn-primary{background:#5f4fe8;color:#fff}.btn-danger{background:transparent;border:1px solid #7f1d1d;color:#fca5a5}.btn-ghost{background:transparent;border:1px solid #2a2a2a;color:#666}.compact .repo-desc{display:none !important}.mce-pagination{display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;margin:8px 0}.mce-pagination button{background:#0d0d0d;border:1px solid #1a1a1a;color:#444;border-radius:4px;padding:3px 9px;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;font-family:monospace}.mce-pagination button:hover{background:#111;color:#aaa}.mce-pagination button[disabled]{opacity:.25;cursor:default}

blocks.code: var id=MCE_VARS['selectedId']||'';if(!id){EventBus.emit('validationFailed',{value:'No repository selected — click a repo row first'});return;}MCE_VARS['editId']=id;EventBus.emit('editMode',{name:MCE_VARS['selName']||'',language:MCE_VARS['selLang']||'',stars:MCE_VARS['selStars']||'0',status:MCE_VARS['selStatus']||'active',author:MCE_VARS['selAuthor']||'',description:MCE_VARS['selDesc']||''});ViewSystem.navigate('form',{});

var nameEl=document.querySelector('[data-mce-id="M44"]');var langEl=document.querySelector('[data-mce-id="M45"]');var starsEl=document.querySelector('[data-mce-id="M46"]');var statusEl=document.querySelector('[data-mce-id="M47"]');var authorEl=document.querySelector('[data-mce-id="M48"]');var descEl=document.querySelector('[data-mce-id="M49"]');var n=nameEl?nameEl.value.trim():'';var l=langEl?langEl.value.trim():'';var s=starsEl?parseInt(starsEl.value)||0:0;var st=statusEl?statusEl.value.trim()||'active':'active';var a=authorEl?authorEl.value.trim():'';var d=descEl?descEl.value.trim():'';var id=MCE_VARS['editId']||'';if(!n){EventBus.emit('validationFailed',{value:'Repository name is required'});return;}var payload={name:n,language:l,stars:s,status:st,author:a,description:d};if(id){PipeSystem.execute('putRepo',{},Object.assign({},payload,{editId:id}));}else{PipeSystem.execute('postRepo',{},payload);}MCE_VARS['editId']='';ViewSystem.navigate('explore',{});

var repos=(window._MCE_LOOP_DATA&&window._MCE_LOOP_DATA['repoList'])||DB.find('repos',{});var total=repos.length;var active=repos.filter(function(r){return r.status==='active';}).length;var archived=repos.filter(function(r){return r.status==='archived';}).length;var lc={};repos.forEach(function(r){if(r.language){lc[r.language]=(lc[r.language]||0)+1;}});var topLang=Object.keys(lc).sort(function(a,b){return lc[b]-lc[a];})[0]||'--';EventBus.emit('statsLoaded',{total:String(total),active:String(active),archived:String(archived),topLang:topLang});

M11.name: dash_sub
M11.text: Open-source repository tracker — load data to see all MCEngine features in action

M20.name: event_log
M20.text: Waiting for events — click Load Data to begin

wires.actionArgs: → formReset — form cleared, editId reset to ''
✓ pipe:postRepo:written — new repo saved to collection

M29.name: repo_list
M29.text: Load data via Dashboard, or type in the search box above.

M32.name: detail_hint
M32.text: ← select a repository from the list to inspect
